package rulefixtures

import (
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for http_server_bootstrap_without_graceful_shutdown_flow: HTTP server startup paths that lack visible signal handling and Shutdown ownership for graceful shutdown.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: idioms; severity: warning.
func scenario383Positive(url string) (*http.Response, error) {
	client := &http.Client{}
	return client.Get(url)
}
